widget_id: The name of the converting organization
label_verbatim: FIRST: Converting Organization — The name of the converting organization:
rationale: Name of the predecessor (converting) organization. Reuses entity.name (the canonical name handle) rather than introducing a parallel conversion.converting_entity.name namespace — the converting entity is THE entity for this filing. Reviewer corrected drafter's conversion.converting_entity.* namespace which would conflict with the existing convention from MBCA-21 / GP_CONV-PARTNER (where the pre-conversion entity is entity.* and the post-conversion entity is conversion.new_entity.*).

widget_id: The form of the converting organization
label_verbatim: The form of the converting organization:
rationale: Free-text legal form of the converting entity (e.g., 'Limited Liability Company', 'Limited Partnership'). Novel key — not previously surfaced because most pass-1 forms are entity-type-specific and don't capture the form type as a fillable field. Generic 'entity.form_type' is preferable to a per-form scoped key.

widget_id: The jurisdiction of the converting organization prior to filing this certificate
label_verbatim: The jurisdiction of the converting organization prior to filing this certificate:
rationale: Jurisdiction of formation/organization for the converting entity. Reuses the existing key from CLKRA-3 / FICT-4 / MERGFOR (where it represents the same primitive).

label_verbatim: FIRST (continued): The date of its organization:
rationale: Date the converting entity was originally formed/organized. Reuses the existing key from MBCA-11 / MLLP-6A. The form's 'date of its organization' is the same primitive as 'date the original articles of incorporation were filed' — terminology varies by entity type but the underlying concept is the entity's formation-filing date.

widget_id: The name of the converted resulting organization
label_verbatim: SECOND: Converted (Resulting) Organization — The name of the converted (resulting) organization:
rationale: Name of the post-conversion (resulting) entity. Reuses the existing key from MBCA-21 / GP_CONV-PARTNER which establishes conversion.new_entity.* as the post-conversion namespace.

widget_id: The form of the converted resulting organization
label_verbatim: The form of the converted (resulting) organization:
rationale: Free-text legal form of the resulting entity. Reuses the existing key from MBCA-21 (free-text) — distinct from GP_CONV-PARTNER's enum-restricted version (4-checkbox radio). MLLCCONV uses the free-text shape since the form provides a single text widget rather than radio checkboxes.

widget_id: The jurisdiction of the converted resulting organizations governing statute
label_verbatim: The jurisdiction of the converted (resulting) organization's governing statute:
rationale: Jurisdiction of formation for the resulting entity (typically Maine if domesticating, or home state if foreign). Novel key — extends the conversion.new_entity.* namespace for forms where the resulting entity may be foreign (unlike MBCA-21 where the resulting entity is always Maine).

label_verbatim: SECOND (continued): The date of its organization:
rationale: Date the resulting entity is/will be organized. Field-id auto-suffixed '_2' to disambiguate from FIRST's identical label. Novel key — in conversions, the resulting entity's formation_date often matches conversion.effective_date (continuity claim) but the form provides a separate widget so synth/rubric must support both populated independently.

widget_id: The address of its principal office is
label_verbatim: SECOND (continued): The address of its principal office is:
rationale: Principal office address of the resulting entity (single combined widget; not split into street/city components). Novel key extending conversion.new_entity.*.

widget_id: The date the conversion is effective under the governing statute of the converted organization
label_verbatim: THIRD: The date the conversion is effective under the governing statute of the converted organization:
rationale: Date the conversion becomes legally effective under the resulting entity's governing law. Novel key — distinct from MBCA-21's conversion.future_effective_date (which is an OPTIONAL future date capped at 90 days). MLLCCONV's THIRD recital is the actual effectiveness date (mandatory) per §1647, not a future-effective election.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: (Foreign Converted Organization Only) ... address of its principal office for the purposes of §1648.3 is: (line 1)
rationale: First address line for the foreign resulting entity's principal office (used for §1648.3 service-of-process — Maine SOS becomes agent for service when the resulting entity is foreign). Novel key. Required when conversion.new_entity.jurisdiction is non-Maine; left blank otherwise.

label_verbatim: SIXTH (continued): (Principal office address — line 2)
rationale: Second address line for the foreign resulting entity's principal office. Form provides two parallel widgets — typically line1=street, line2=city/state/zip, but the form does not enforce that split. Synth/rubric concatenates as needed.

widget_id: The organizing document for the converted resulting organization is attached as Exhibit
label_verbatim: SEVENTH: Result of Conversion (Select One) — *The organizing document for the converted (resulting) organization is attached as Exhibit ___
rationale: Inline exhibit-letter for the resulting entity's organizing document. Reuses the existing key from MBCA-21 / GP_CONV-PARTNER which establishes this primitive.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH (option 1): [ ] *The organizing document for the converted (resulting) organization is attached as Exhibit ___, and made a part hereof
rationale: Mutually-exclusive radio option for conversion.organizing_document_disposition='attached_as_exhibit'. Form text 'Select One' establishes XOR with Check Box5.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH (option 2): [ ] The converted (resulting) is an organization not filing with the Maine Secretary of State's office.
rationale: Mutually-exclusive radio option for conversion.organizing_document_disposition='not_filing_with_sos' (e.g., the resulting entity is a general partnership or out-of-state entity that doesn't file organic documents with the Maine SOS).

widget_id: name and form of converting organization
label_verbatim: Must Be Completed by the Converting Organization — (name and form of converting organization)
rationale: Combined recital widget that captures the converting entity's name and form together at the signature block (e.g., 'Acme LLC, a Maine limited liability company'). Combined-recital pattern (cf. merger.surviving_entity.name_and_jurisdiction in MBCA-10) — synth derives from entity.name + entity.form_type at fill time.

label_verbatim: (dated)
rationale: Signing date for the converting-organization signature block.

widget_id: type or print name and capacity
label_verbatim: Signer slot 1 — (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity for converting-organization signer slot 1 — Shape D per filing-signer-shape convention. Multi-slot extension filing.signer_N.* (same pattern as MLLC-5A / MLLCACSOA).

widget_id: type or print name and capacity_2
label_verbatim: Signer slot 2 — (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity for converting-organization signer slot 2.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [2]
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Likely populated with conversion.new_entity.name (the resulting entity) for SOS routing — same bundling pattern as MBCA-21.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.

label_verbatim: 24-hour expedited filing
rationale: Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.

label_verbatim: Immediate expedited filing
rationale: Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'.

label_verbatim: Total fee(s) enclosed: $
rationale: Total fees (fee structure varies by resulting entity type — see open_questions; expedite premium added per tier).

label_verbatim: (Name of contact person)
rationale: Filing-contact name.

label_verbatim: (Daytime telephone number)
rationale: Filing-contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: (Contact email address for this filing)
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email — applies to whichever post-conversion entity will file Maine annual reports. Often left blank or routed to the resulting entity if it remains a Maine filer.

label_verbatim: (Name of attested copy recipient)
rationale: Recipient name.

label_verbatim: (Firm or Company)
rationale: Recipient firm.

label_verbatim: (Mailing Address)
rationale: Recipient street.

label_verbatim: (City, State & Zip)
rationale: Recipient city/state/zip combined.
